items.name: Agenda set + buy-in
items.cite_quote: I figured we'd start with a quick agenda
items.rationale: Explicit agenda signposted and buyer confirmed.

items.name: Question depth & spread
items.cite_quote: tell me about how you handle collections today
items.rationale: Some open questions but under the 11+ target and uneven spread.

items.name: Pain quantified in $ or days
items.rationale: Pain stayed qualitative — no number extracted despite a direct ask.

items.name: Economic Buyer named
items.rationale: A second name surfaced but approval process not probed.

items.name: Champion test
items.rationale: Contact volunteered internal pull and named frustration.

items.name: Multi-thread setup
items.rationale: No committee mapped; single-threaded buying history.

items.name: Talk ratio 40-46% rep
items.cite_quote: then we can see if there's a fit
items.rationale: Roughly balanced, no long monologue, but slightly rep-heavy in spots.

items.name: Implication question landed
items.rationale: Implication attempted but elicited no buyer-stated consequence number.

items.name: Next step locked
items.cite_quote: Let's lock Thursday at 2pm with you and Dana
items.rationale: Specific date and attendees; agenda could be sharper.
